title: pilosella cochlearis subsp. pseudauricula
intro: Pilosella cochlearis subsp. pseudauricula, also known as the False Auricula, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Pilosella cochlearis subsp. pseudauricula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a valuable remedy for gastrointestinal issues and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected area.
